---
title: "The Rev. Pender Hodge Cudlip"
---

## The Rev. Pender Hodge Cudlip

**Dates:** (1835-1911)

### Description

Vicar of Sparkwell

### Biography

He served as curate of Yealmton 1866-71, and was Vicar of Sparkwell 1884.  He married (1867) Annie Hall Thomas (1836-1918), the novelist. [tablet in All Saints, Sparkwell]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 22 [1869]
- Letter from 16 July [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
